channel.title: Inkwell for Mac
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.2
item.description:
Changes in this version:

  • Added new reply button and File → Reply for adding a reply in the Conversation window.

item.title: Version 1.1.3
item.description:
Changes in this version:

  • Added new photo window when clicking on images in blog posts or Reading Recap.
  • Fixed occasional display problem with rows in the sidebar.

item.title: Version 1.1.2
item.description:
Changes in this version:

  • Added new post button to toolbar. It creates a link to the current blog post, with selected text if any as a quote.
  • Updated highlight button in the toolbar to add a little color.
  • Fixed View menu → Reading Recap to not switch selected tab.

item.title: Version 1.1
item.description:
Changes in this version:

  • Added podcast controls when viewing a blog post that has an audio file attached.
  • Fixed row selection with arrow keys after marking a post as unread.

item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description:
Changes in this version:

  • Added URL at bottom of window when hovering over a link.
  • Added File → Share and Print.
  • Improved sidebar post items to use "..." when truncating title and summary.
  • Fixed potential hang on launch upgrading from 1.0.
  • Fixed avatar icon flicker when searching all highlights.
  • Fixed enabling Reading Recap when hiding read posts.

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
Changes in this version:

  • Added "Delete Highlight" when right-clicking on a highlight. This is also available from the Window menu → Highlights.
  • Improved showing last selected post when app starts up.
  • Fixed highlights background color in dark mode.
  • Fixed white flicker when changing selected post in dark mode.
  • Fixed remembering "Hide Read Posts" preference.

item.title: Version 1.0
item.description:
Changes in this version:

  • First version!
